title: Rich Argentinian Vanilla Custard
description: A spicy, dense, comforting dessert featuring a rich vanilla custard base with a subtle kick of cinnamon, perfect for chilly evenings.

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: use pure vanilla for best flavor

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine 1 cup heavy cream, 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tsp cinnamon, and 2 tsp vanilla extract.
Heat on medium-low until the cream just begins to steam (do not boil).
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes to thicken slightly.
Strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove cinnamon bits, then pour into a serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour before serving.
